name: Duetto Hotel Revenue Strategy API
what_it_does: Duetto REST API for hotel revenue management system (RMS) and pricing intelligence platform. Enables AI agents to retrieve revenue recommendations and pricing strategies, access demand forecasting data, manage rate configurations, and integrate revenue optimization data with PMS and channel manager systems. Duetto's Open Pricing approach dynamically optimizes rates across all room types and channels.
use_cases: Retrieving price recommendations from revenue optimization agents
Accessing demand forecasting data from hospitality analytics agents
Integrating revenue intelligence with PMS from hotel operations agents
Monitoring competitive rate data from pricing intelligence agents
not_for: Small independent hotels without revenue management investment
Non-hotel businesses without hospitality pricing needs
Manual rate management without automated revenue optimization
best_when: A hotel chain, casino, or vacation rental operator using Duetto wants AI agents to access revenue recommendations, integrate pricing data with PMS, and automate rate optimization workflows.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK: Revenue management pricing decisions directly impact hotel revenue. Incorrect pricing recommendations or rate pushes can lead to lost revenue or reputational damage.

auth.notes: Duetto uses OAuth 2.0 for API authentication. Partner and PMS vendor credentials required via Duetto partner program. Enterprise hotel customers access through their Duetto implementation.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — enterprise revenue management SaaS
pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise annual contracts per property; pricing by hotel portfolio size
pricing.notes: US company. Enterprise hotel RMS. Used by major hotel brands globally. Partner program for PMS integration vendors.

performance.rate_limits: Enterprise SLA rate limits per partner

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: Pricing recommendations directly impact hotel revenue — validate before automatic rate push
No public MCP server — enterprise REST API via partner program
Partner program approval required for PMS/channel manager integrations
Rate push to PMS via API must coordinate with availability and restriction data
Demand forecasting data is predictive — communicate uncertainty to downstream systems
Casino and resort pricing models (gaming, package rates) differ from standard hotel rates
agent_readiness.security_notes: FINANCIAL RISK: Hotel pricing and revenue data. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2. Enterprise partner program required. Rate recommendations drive real revenue.

security_score_components.security_notes: Hotel pricing and revenue data. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2. Enterprise partner program required.
